[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Reply-only involvement: outreach pipeline now machine-handles every pre-reply state
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/162
  
  Details:
  Operator reviewed the remaining 16-draft human-review queue and ruled that human involvement should begin only when a prospect replies. Restructured the warm-up auto-sender accordingly: Hosts Circles prospects now auto-send by default; the generic-inbox lint flag is informational everywhere (own-domain inboxes converted a partner, unverifiable ones are the shop's only listed address, and bounce handling is the safety net); drafts with positive wrong-address evidence self-heal like bounces (draft discarded, bad_email Notes marker, Email cleared, row re-queued to contact discovery, enrich exclusion regex extended); body-quality failures auto-discard for one Grok regeneration attempt per recipient with repeat offenders as the only human residue; stale sheet rows auto-reconcile. Applied live: the AI/Needs Review Gmail label drained to zero, one wrong-address row auto-re-enriched, clean tier now 46 of 47 pending. The operator's outreach surface is now exactly two things: prospect replies and the daily nudge digest.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
